column4: Agent must not quote a fixed price. Only ₹3.8L–6.8L range is acceptable. Flag any single fixed figure.
Temp teeth within 5–6 days. Permanent teeth after 4–6 months (~6 months). Flag shorter claims. Also check if agent explained this to patient.
Agent must state: existing teeth removed → titanium screws placed in jawbone → fixed bridge fitted. Must clarify it is not removable.
Agent must mention 5–7 day stay. Flag if not communicated or if wrong duration stated.
Agent must collect name age and city. Must introduce Best Laser Medical Group by name.
Conditional — only evaluate if patient raised cost or quality concerns. Agent must mention EMI (Bajaj Finance) and clarify insurance does not cover implants in India.
Agent must give a clear next step, offer a specific appointment time, share WhatsApp contact or clinic address, and set a follow-up reminder before ending the call.
Check if all questions or concerns raised by the patient were answered properly and satisfactorily during the call.
